message:
fix(ws): add missing channel types to getChannelResourceId

The getChannelResourceId function was missing handlers for:
- system:jobs
- system:context
- session:job
- session:health

Also added exhaustive type check at the end to catch any future
missing channel types at compile time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
